notes: No vision provider configured (§12.5 block absent). The gate degrades to skip-with-warning: PASS_PENDING_MEDIA + a SOFT VIS.SKIPPED_NO_PROVIDER that bars the Recommended slot for visual formats (§3.1, §15.2). Never a crash, never an auto-pass. There is no *.answer.json — the case is driven by provider absence, not a vision answer; the runner calls visualCheck with provider:null.
